title.en: Ye Tian chose the target and waited for the rig...

content.en:
Most of the extra-dimensional realms in the No. 6 Fog Mother Fruit are second realm cultivation, as for whether there is a third realm, he is not clear, but there are also superdimensional elves who are cultivated in the first realm.

These super-dimensional elves who have cultivated in the first realm are all very demonic or have very good backgrounds.

For example, not long after entering the first realm of cultivation, he comprehended the extradimensional rules, and he comprehended them on his own, and did not rely on the core of the fog mother, or the heirs of some third-realm superdimensional elves, who were also eligible to enter the No. 6 fog mother fruit.

Ye Tian continued to look for a target, and finally set his sights on a superdimensional elf who had cultivated in the late stage of the first realm, the other party did not comprehend the superdimensional rules, but the background was very deep, and he was the heir of a certain third-realm superdimensional elf, so he could enter the fruit of the sixth fog mother.

"Junlin Realm Lord, choose him!"

Ye Tian chose the target and waited for the right opportunity to do it.

......

As the heir of the third realm superdimensional elf, the talent of the Junlin Realm Lord is average, otherwise he would not have failed to comprehend the superdimensional rules so far, and he is not very diligent, anyway, his lifespan is endless, and there is no danger, and naturally he has no motivation to cultivate.

However, he can't be idle at all, he often goes in and out of the fruit of the fog mother, and he is also good at making friends with various extra-dimensional realms, but it must be a potential extra-dimensional realm, otherwise 557 He is too lazy to befriend him.

this day.

Ye Tian befriended the Junlin Realm Lord, he was also a strong man who comprehended the extradimensional rules, even if the background was not as good as the Junlin Realm Lord, but the Junlin Realm Lord was very polite to Ye Tian, after all, any superdimensional elf who comprehended the extradimensional rules had very good future potential.

As a result, Ye Tian continued to make friends with this Junlin Realm Lord and build a good relationship.

After a while.

Ye Tian invited this Junlin Realm Lord into his mansion, and the moment the other party came in, he made a move.

"Boom !!!"

The super-dimensional annihilation technique performed under the blessing of more than six hundred super-dimensional rules killed the Junlin Realm Lord with a single blow.

"I was killed directly, and there was really nothing to save my life!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, the superdimensional elves have been staying here in the Wood of the Mother of Mist, and if they don't go out, there is no danger, so it is naturally impossible to wear anything to protect their lives, otherwise, Ye Tian would not dare to attack the Junlin Realm Lord.

After killing the Junlin Realm Lord, the Junlin Realm Lord's copy body that he had already copied immediately replaced the Junlin Realm Lord, put on all the items on his body, and then left here and went to the No. 6 Fog Mother Fruit.

Whether or not the Mother of Mist Flower will help boost the Copying talent will soon be revealed.

He moved quickly, and he didn't dare to delay time, because he didn't know how long the death of the Junlin Realm Lord could be concealed, and maybe it would be exposed for a long time.

So, he had to hurry.

......

Inside the Fruit of the Mother of Fog No. 6.

After Ye Tian came in, he really sensed a very faint attraction, attracting his copying talent.

At this moment, he was extremely excited, and after countless years, he had finally found a treasure that could improve his copying talent again!

Swish!

He moved quickly, following the induction to the location of the Jellyfish Flower.

It didn't take long for him to come to the inner core of the No. 6 Mother of Mist Fruit, where the fiber vines of the wood grew, which were impressively connected to the mother of fog wood, and the flowers of the mother of fog grew on these fiber vines.

"Junlin Realm Lord, what are you doing here?"

An extradimensional realm of the second realm asked.

Ye Tian had already noticed that there was a second realm superdimensional elf guarding here, and he didn't think it was very strange.

The Flower of the Mother of Mist is so precious, it would be strange if there was no super-dimensional elf to guard it, but there is only one super-dimensional elf guarding it, and he is obviously not too worried that the Flower of the Mother of Mist will be stolen.

After all, ordinary extra-dimensional elves can't enter here, and the super-dimensional elves who can be qualified to settle in the No. 6 Fog Mother Fruit have different identities and backgrounds, almost all of them have eaten the Flower of the Mist Mother, and they really won't snatch the Flower of the Mist Mother.

"Xunsha Realm Lord, I want a Flower of the Mother of Mist!"

Ye Tian asked tentatively.

"Junlin Realm Lord, haven't you ever taken the Flower of the Mother of Mist, the Flower of the Mother of Mist in the clan is limited, without the order from above, I can't (dbaj) let you take a Flower of the Mother of Mist!" This Xunsha Realm Lord refused Ye Tian's request.

"Xunsha Realm Master, I just want one, it's my father who is useful, and I need him to do research, maybe it will help my extradimensional bloodline transform again. Ye Tian found such an excuse, as for whether the Lord of Xunsha Realm believed it or not, he didn't know.

But he had limited time and could only do so.

The Xunsha Realm Lord didn't ask much, if he didn't give it, he would be in trouble if he angered the Falling Sea Realm Lord.

So, he didn't dare not give it.

If the Junlin Realm Lord deliberately deceived him, the clan would trouble the Junlin Realm Lord afterwards and would not punish him.

Soon.

A flower of the Mother of Mist was delivered to Ye Tian's hand. []

Ye Tian immediately left, and then returned to the thirty-sixth Fog Mother Fruit.

After returning, he immediately let the replica body devour the flower of the Mist Mother, thereby enhancing the replica body.

Rumble!!!!!

The replica body absorbed the energy of the Mist Mother Flower and began to transform rapidly.

Time passed, and he knew very well that he might soon be discovered.

Therefore, he must complete the transformation as soon as possible.

It didn't take long.

The truth of the fall of the Junlin Realm Lord was still discovered, and for the first time, a terrifying force crossed one Fog Mother Fruit after another, locking onto his Junlin Realm Lord's copy body.

"Boom!"

Ye Tian directly blew himself up and died, and he must not be discovered by the superdimensional elf clan to other copy bodies.

Meanwhile.

Inside the No. 1 Fog Mother Fruit, a powerhouse of the superdimensional elf clan was furious.

The fall of the Junlin Realm Lord is a trivial matter, they don't care, but there is a strong person who pretends to be the Junlin Realm Lord and takes away a flower of the Mother of Mist, if it is okay within the clan, if it is a super-dimensional realm outside the clan, then the matter is serious.

"Using the Mist Mother True Stone, if there is an extra-dimensional realm from the outside world mixed in, it will definitely not be able to avoid the prying eyes of the Mist Mother True Stone. "An extradimensional realm proposed.

"Good!"

Other top brass agreed.

Soon, the Mist Mother True Stone was urged.

Rumble!

The light of the Mist Mother True Stone locked the Mist Mother Fruit one by one, and time passed slowly, and it didn't take long for the light of the Mist Mother True Stone to begin to probe the No. 36 Mist Mother Fruit, and also locked Ye Tian's copy body.

In a flash.

His body froze and he couldn't move.

"Damn, it was discovered again, and it is just that the copy body of the Junlin Realm Lord is easy to be exposed, but my copy body is so low-key that it was locked for the first time, it seems that no matter how much I copy the body, I can't hide the high-level of the superdimensional elf clan. "

Fortunately, his copying talent has been transformed, otherwise he would really not be able to blow himself up.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's replica body blew itself up and died, but it's a pity that the soul pupil on his body is a good thing, but it can't be taken away.
